module.name: timeline
module.description: Displays multiple contents beautifully as a vertical timeline (steps).

param.name: indexes
param.label: Custom Labels
param.desc: Array of marker labels, e.g. [Phase1, Phase2, Phase3]

snippet.label: Timeline
snippet.text: <!-- @timeline active_index: 2, indexes: [Phase1, Phase2, Phase3] --> ### Phase 1: Requirements & Research Identify issues through user interviews. <!-- @ --> ### Phase 2: System Design & Prototyping Create screen mockups and gather feedback. <!-- @ --> ### Phase 3: Development & QA Proceed with agile development and conduct integration testing. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Converts multiple sections into a vertical step display with sequential numbers (or custom labels). Markdown is supported inside.
